description: Log in as admin (username: `admin`, password: `Admin1234!`) and import lab scores from `/home/ga/Documents/lab_scores.csv` into the 'Introduction to Biology' (BIO101) course gradebook. Map the 'Student Email' column from the CSV to the 'Email address' in Moodle and the 'Practical Result' column to the existing 'Lab Practical 1' grade item.
